creator: nick@triantos.com
text:
Hi,

I am seeing the exact same symptoms as the original reporter (Martin van =
Gagern) reported, however I was not using rsync, as far as I know.

I now have a dangling file which I appear to be unable to delete:

    [nick@bsd /tank/path/to/file]$ ls
    ls: 36b6: No such file or directory

How can this be related to a tool like rsync?  I would hope it should be =
impossible for a user-mode application to put the file system in an =
inconsistent state.

thanks, and best regards,
-Nick=
